title: Discounted Trash/Recycling Service * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Discounted Trash/Recycling Service * Older Adults 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF MID-COLUMBIA COMMUNITY ACTION COUNCIL MID COLUMBIA COMMUNITY ACTION COUNCIL HOOD RIVER UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides energy payment assistance programs, emergency assistance for electric bills, heating fuel payment assistance, low-income water assistance programs, water, and garbage discount programs. 606 State Street Suite 1b Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: -Energy assistance: Low-income households -Emergency assistance: Low-income households with past due or shut-off notices -Water or power discounts: Residents served by the City of Hood River Water who have an active Pacific Power account in the applicant's name. Apartments or rentals that have water paid by another party are eligible for the discount as long as they are within the service area of City of Hood River. The City applies a discount to the client’s Pacific Power bill in lieu of a water bill discount in that case. -Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities: Monthly power, water, sewer, and garbage bill discounts for customers of City of The Dalles, Northern Wasco County PUD, and The Dalles or Hood River Disposal -Outreach: Must live within the service area and demonstrate crisis or a special need. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 298-5131 206 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID-COLUMBIA COMMUNITY ACTION COUNCIL THE GLORIA CENTER UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides energy payment assistance programs, emergency assistance for electric bills, heating fuel payment assistance, low-income water assistance programs, water, and garbage discount programs. 2505 W 7th Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: -Energy assistance: Low-income households -Emergency assistance: Low-income households with past due or shut-off notices -Water or power discounts: Residents served by the City of Hood River Water who have an active Pacific Power account in the applicant's name. Apartments or rentals that have water paid by another party are eligible for the discount as long as they are within the service area of City of Hood River. The City applies a discount to the client’s Pacific Power bill in lieu of a water bill discount in that case. -Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities: Monthly power, water, sewer, and garbage bill discounts for customers of City of The Dalles, Northern Wasco County PUD, and The Dalles or Hood River Disposal -Outreach: Must live within the service area and demonstrate crisis or a special need. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 298-5131 200 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY COMMUNITY ACTION ENERGY SERVICES GARBAGE, SEWER, AND WATER DISCOUNT REFERRAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referral to the City of Salem's Rate Relief program for garbage, sewer, and water discounts. 4700 Silverton Road NE Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: -City of Salem account holder residing in the home -Age 60 and older or documented permanent disability household member -Gross household income does not exceed 60% of state median income based on family size -Referals made for current year LIHEAP/OEAP recipients (October-September) Hours: Walk in: Monday-Thursday 8am-4:30pm Phones: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed holidays Email (503) 588-9016 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID-COLUMBIA COMMUNITY ACTION COUNCIL UTILITY ASSISTANCE MID-COLUMBIA COMMUNITY ACTION COUNCIL UTILITY ASSISTANCE MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY GARBAGE, SEWER, AND WATER DISCOUNT REFERRAL PROGRAM
